job_domain: Commercial partnerships, growth analytics, and go-to-market
remote_policy: Remote work is allowed; whether the role is fully remote or hybrid is not specified
key_responsibilities: Own the launch of Zable car insurance and mobile products on price comparison websites from initial partner discussions through integration, go-live, and ongoing optimisation.
Monitor channel performance by tracking volume, conversion, and customer acquisition cost at partner level, identifying drivers of change and corrective actions.
Manage strategic and day-to-day partner relationships, develop new ideas, and hold partners accountable to delivery milestones.
Prepare data analysis and clear recommendations to support commercial decisions.
Negotiate customer acquisition costs and commissions with key partners and identify cost-optimisation opportunities.
Work cross-functionally with Product, Pricing, Data, and Compliance to scope integrations, complete partner due diligence, and advance projects.
Monitor mobile and insurance partnership markets, including new entrants, product changes, and competitor activity, and share insights internally.
Gradually take full ownership of the strategy and execution of selected partnership projects, marketing initiatives, or product enhancements.
Assess new partnership opportunities and maintain a clear view of the partner pipeline.
Own due diligence checks and ongoing compliance monitoring for partners.
required_skills: Have 2-3+ years of experience in a commercial, consulting, partnerships, analytical, business development, or account management role.
Be proficient in manipulating and visualising data using AI-assisted SQL and/or Python.
Use commercial modelling to support decisions.
Communicate strongly and represent Lendable externally while building trusted internal and external relationships.
Demonstrably use AI tools to improve work, such as automating repetitive tasks, accelerating analysis, improving writing, or finding faster answers.
Be outcome-driven, proactive, and able to prioritise and independently drive projects.
Work effectively in a collaborative team while being comfortable with individually visible performance and impact.
preferred_qualifications: Experience in financial services or a high-growth technology environment.
